requiredChecks: required credential refs or leases resolve
operator approval record is approved and unexpired
rollback or revocation path is recorded
forbiddenBypassSignals: implicit fallback from live to fixture
liveMutationGate.disabledLiveSmoke: Run a live-disabled smoke proving provider mutation remains blocked even when provider-looking env vars are present.

commandEvidence: provider fixture proves no outbound send/call/domain/DNS/write happened

credentialRequirements.failClosedDiagnostic: SES credential ref is required for provider health, sandbox, or live send.

operations.rollbackOrRevocation: Disable provider credential lease and reconcile bounce/complaint or suppress recipient after send.
operations.noSideEffectSmoke: Fixture and sandbox send smokes must prove no production recipient delivery.
operations.reconciliation: Delivery event, bounce, complaint, and suppression records reconcile to message id.

operations.noSideEffectSmoke: DNS/domain readiness command must not change MX, DKIM, SPF, DMARC, route, or purchase state.

operationCards.rateLimitPosture: Provider send limits and domain verification limits must be reported before enabling live mutation.
operationCards.costPosture: Live sends can incur provider delivery and storage costs.
redactionRules: recipient addresses are redacted in diagnostics
credential refs are displayed without secret values

credentialRequirements.failClosedDiagnostic: Twilio credential ref is required for webhook validation, sandbox, or live calls/messages.

operations.rollbackOrRevocation: Emergency disable provider lease, block destination, stop queues, and reconcile provider status callbacks.
operations.noSideEffectSmoke: Fixture and sandbox smokes must prove no production SMS, WhatsApp, or voice call.
operations.reconciliation: Outbound job status reconciles with Twilio message/call/status callback identifiers.

operations.noSideEffectSmoke: Webhook fixture verifies signature, timestamp freshness, replay nonce, and expected URL without placing calls.

operationCards.rateLimitPosture: Per-agent quotas, destination allow or deny rules, spend caps, and emergency disable are required.
operationCards.costPosture: Live messages, calls, number provisioning, and media can incur provider costs.
redactionRules: provider SIDs and webhook auth data are redacted

credentialRequirements.failClosedDiagnostic: Webhook signing credential ref is required for sandbox or live forwarding.

operations.rollbackOrRevocation: Disable forwarding endpoint, dead-letter unconfirmed jobs, and revoke webhook signing lease.
operations.noSideEffectSmoke: Fixture forwarding writes only local delivery evidence and never calls external destinations.
operations.reconciliation: Forwarding job status reconciles to delivery receipt, retry, or dead-letter record.

operationCards.rateLimitPosture: Submission rate limits, app quotas, retry leases, and dead-letter caps are required.
redactionRules: PII fields are classified before export
webhook signing secrets are never emitted

blockedUntil: canonical open-mailery/open-emails root decision is recorded

requiredEvidence: public submit versus private read/export auth matrix

evidenceRefs.summary: Provider/deployment reviewer requirements for capability cards, live modes, approval, and reconciliation.
OSS finance/comms task proposals for mailery, telephony, and feedback first adopters.
